name: Maple Walnut Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease baking sheets with butter-flavored Crisco.
3. In a large bowl, combine Crisco, light brown sugar, egg, milk, vanilla, and maple flavoring. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
4. In another bowl, mix oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture on low speed just until combined.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 2 minutes on baking sheets.
8. Remove cookies to a kitchen counter.
9. Frost top with frosting mixture and garnish with a walnut half.
Frosting: Mix vanilla frosting with maple flavoring to your desired taste.
